creator: Hunter Micheletto
source_text:
🔥 Sticky Korean BBQ Stuffed Sweet Potatoes

✅ Save this because these are ridiculously good.

📕 Comment “cookbook” and I’ll send you the link purchase link to 225+ high-protein recipes with full macros and step-by-step videos.

🛒 WHAT YOU NEED (4 SERVINGS)

🍠 Sweet Potatoes
* 4 medium sweet potatoes (about 1.8–2 lbs total)

🥩 Korean BBQ Beef
* 1 lb (454g) 96/4 lean ground beef
* salt, pepper, garlic 
* 1/3 cup low-sodium soy sauce
* 1 tbsp honey
* 1 tbsp gochujang
* 1 tbsp rice vinegar
* 6 garlic cloves, minced
* 1 tsp ginger paste
* 1 tsp corn starch 
* Green onions 

🍳 Toppings
* 4 eggs
* 2 green onions, sliced
* 2 tsp sesame seeds

Macros (Per Serving)
Calories: 485
Protein: 35g
Carbs: 41g
Fat: 18g

expected.name: Sticky Korean BBQ Stuffed Sweet Potatoes

notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
The description provides ingredients and macros but no preparation instructions, so this is intentionally an incomplete fallback case.
The parser matched all scored fields and completeness exactly.
